Smart Campus Library System

How to run:
1. Open this folder.
2. Double-click OOP_GuillermoBenitez.exe.

Keep the data folder next to the executable. The program uses those CSV files
to load and save books, members, and loans.

If Windows says a Microsoft Visual C++ runtime DLL is missing, install the
Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015-2022.
